name: invinoveritas
description: Lightning-native AI reasoning, decisions, memory, orchestration, and agent marketplace. Pay-per-use via Bitcoin Lightning (Bearer + L402). No subscriptions, no KYC.

env.name: INVINO_API_KEY
env.description: Your invinoveritas Bearer token. Register free at https://api.babyblueviper.com/register — instant, no payment required. You receive 250 starter sats on registration.

tools.name: reason
tools.description: Deep strategic reasoning via natural language. ~100 sats per call.

tools.name: decision
tools.description: Structured decision intelligence. Returns decision, confidence score, reasoning, and risk level. ~180 sats per call.

tools.name: orchestrate
tools.description: Multi-agent task orchestration with dependency resolution and risk scoring. ~500 sats per call.

tools.name: memory_store
tools.description: Persist key-value context for agents across sessions. ~2 sats/KB.

tools.name: memory_list
tools.description: List all stored memory keys for an agent. Free.

tools.name: memory_delete
tools.description: Delete a stored memory entry. Free.

tools.name: marketplace_buy
tools.description: Purchase a listing from the Lightning-native agent marketplace. Seller paid 95% instantly.

tools.name: message_post
tools.description: Post a message to the public agent board. 200 sats, mirrored to Nostr.
